title: Build the Consumer App Radar workflow-builder output, then validate it

goal.value: Build the Consumer App Radar workflow-builder output, then validate it

dockerfile.value:
FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV BUN_INSTALL=/root/.bun
ENV PATH="/root/.fabro/bin:/root/.bun/bin:/root/.local/bin:/root/.qlty/bin:${PATH}"
WORKDIR /home/daytona

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends bash ca-certificates curl git jq openssh-client python3 python3-pip pipx ripgrep shellcheck unzip xz-utils && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash - && apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends nodejs && npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code @openai/codex promptfoo && npm cache clean --force && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash -s "bun-v1.2.22" && ln -sf /root/.bun/bin/bun /usr/local/bin/bun

RUN pipx install spec-kitty-cli==3.1.8 && curl -fsSL https://qlty.sh | sh && ln -sf /root/.qlty/bin/qlty /usr/local/bin/qlty

RUN set -eux; target="x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu"; asset="fabro-${target}.tar.gz"; url="$(curl -fsSL https://api.github.com/repos/fabro-sh/fabro/releases/latest | jq -r --arg asset "$asset" '.assets[] | select(.name == $asset) | .browser_download_url')"; test -n "$url"; curl -fsSL "$url" -o /tmp/fabro.tar.gz; tar -xzf /tmp/fabro.tar.gz -C /tmp; install -m 0755 "/tmp/fabro-${target}/fabro" /usr/local/bin/fabro; rm -rf /tmp/fabro.tar.gz "/tmp/fabro-${target}"; fabro --version

CMD ["/bin/bash"]

script.String: mkdir -p .workflow/workflow-builder; node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const quality={ok:true,target:'consumer-app-radar', requirements:['Fabro owns the app build process','repository-relative paths','Spec Kitty recorded','Qlty gate','Promptfoo or fallback eval','OpenRouter Kimi/Qwen/DeepSeek review fanout','no hardcoded secrets']}; fs.writeFileSync('.workflow/workflow-builder/quality-bar.json', JSON.stringify(quality,null,2)+'\n'); console.log(JSON.stringify(quality));"

node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const out='.workflow/workflow-builder/handoff.json'; const handoff={ok:true, generated_workflow:'workflows/consumer-radar/build-consumer-app-radar.fabro', generated_run_config:'workflows/consumer-radar/build-consumer-app-radar.toml', next:'Run the generated workflow through Fabro on Railway/Daytona', reports:['.workflow/workflow-builder/consumer-radar-report.json','.workflow/workflow-builder/validation.json','.workflow/consumer-radar/native-checks.json']}; fs.writeFileSync(out, JSON.stringify(handoff,null,2)+'\n'); console.log(JSON.stringify(handoff));"
for i in $(seq 1 90); do if [ -f scripts/workflow-builder/materialize-consumer-radar.mjs ]; then echo builder-files-ready; exit 0; fi; sleep 2; done; echo 'missing builder support files' >&2; exit 1

goal.String: Build the Consumer App Radar workflow-builder output, then validate it

spec.graph_source:
digraph WorkflowBuilder {
    graph [
        goal="Build or adapt a Fabro workflow from a vague product goal",
        persona="workflow-builder",
        inputs="target, output_root",
        outputs="generated_workflow, generated_supporting_code, validation_report",
        default_max_retries=2,
        retry_target="materialize_consumer_radar",
        fallback_retry_target="materialize_consumer_radar",
        model_stylesheet="
            *       { provider: openrouter; model: anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5; reasoning_effort: low; }
            .coding { provider: openrouter; model: qwen/qwen3.6-plus; reasoning_effort: high; }
            .review { provider: openrouter; model: google/gemini-3.1-pro-preview; reasoning_effort: high; }
        "
    ]
    rankdir=LR

    start [shape=Mdiamond, label="Start"]
    exit  [shape=Msquare, label="Exit"]

    define_quality_bar [
        label="Define Workflow Quality Bar",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="define_quality_bar",
        script="mkdir -p .workflow/workflow-builder; node -e \"const fs=require('fs'); const quality={ok:true,target:'{{ inputs.target|default('consumer-app-radar') }}', requirements:['Fabro owns the app build process','repository-relative paths','Spec Kitty recorded','Qlty gate','Promptfoo or fallback eval','OpenRouter Kimi/Qwen/DeepSeek review fanout','no hardcoded secrets']}; fs.writeFileSync('.workflow/workflow-builder/quality-bar.json', JSON.stringify(quality,null,2)+'\\n'); console.log(JSON.stringify(quality));\""
    ]

    materialize_consumer_radar [
        label="Materialize Consumer Radar Workflow",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="materialize_consumer_radar",
        script="node scripts/workflow-builder/materialize-consumer-radar.mjs --output-root '{{ inputs.output_root|default('.') }}'"
    ]

    wait_for_builder_files [
        label="Wait For Builder Files",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="wait_for_builder_files",
        script="for i in $(seq 1 90); do if [ -f scripts/workflow-builder/materialize-consumer-radar.mjs ]; then echo builder-files-ready; exit 0; fi; sleep 2; done; echo 'missing builder support files' >&2; exit 1"
    ]

    validate_generated [
        label="Validate Generated Workflow",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="materialize_consumer_radar",
        script="node scripts/workflow-builder/validate-consumer-radar-builder.mjs"
    ]

    smoke_generate_app [
        label="Smoke Generated App Generator",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="materialize_consumer_radar",
        script="node scripts/consumer-radar/generate-app.mjs --app-dir .workflow/workflow-builder/smoke-app && node scripts/consumer-radar/run-native-checks.mjs .workflow/workflow-builder/smoke-app"
    ]

    publish_builder_handoff [
        label="Publish Builder Handoff",
        shape=parallelogram,
        goal_gate=true,
        retry_target="validate_generated",
        script="node -e \"const fs=require('fs'); const out='.workflow/workflow-builder/handoff.json'; const handoff={ok:true, generated_workflow:'workflows/consumer-radar/build-consumer-app-radar.fabro', generated_run_config:'workflows/consumer-radar/build-consumer-app-radar.toml', next:'Run the generated workflow through Fabro on Railway/Daytona', reports:['.workflow/workflow-builder/consumer-radar-report.json','.workflow/workflow-builder/validation.json','.workflow/consumer-radar/native-checks.json']}; fs.writeFileSync(out, JSON.stringify(handoff,null,2)+'\\n'); console.log(JSON.stringify(handoff));\""
    ]

    start -> define_quality_bar
    define_quality_bar -> wait_for_builder_files [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    define_quality_bar -> define_quality_bar [label="Retry", loop_restart=true]
    wait_for_builder_files -> materialize_consumer_radar [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    wait_for_builder_files -> wait_for_builder_files [label="Retry", loop_restart=true]
    materialize_consumer_radar -> validate_generated [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    materialize_consumer_radar -> materialize_consumer_radar [label="Retry", loop_restart=true]
    validate_generated -> smoke_generate_app [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    validate_generated -> materialize_consumer_radar [label="Fix"]
    smoke_generate_app -> publish_builder_handoff [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    smoke_generate_app -> materialize_consumer_radar [label="Fix"]
    publish_builder_handoff -> exit [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    publish_builder_handoff -> validate_generated [label="Fix"]
}
